programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Now We Know!
programme.desc: WBC Productions alongside Steve Guttenberg present Now We Know! Inspiring and educating audiences - Nelnet Campus Commerce, Tennant Company, International Vitamin Corporation, and Ingenico.

programme.title: Flu? Urgent Care at Home with The Wellness Docs
programme.desc: Brutal flu/cold season is here. Have an urgent care and pharmacy in your home - with The Wellness Doctors.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM. This coin boasts a minscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver! This set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A Philadelphia con man gets four years in prison for leading a massive auto insurance fraud scheme that involves 267 associates, 187 fraudulent insurance claims and 44 car accidents.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man attempts suicide and confesses to an extraordinary fraud that he perpetrated for the past two decades at a leading commodity futures brokerage.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When the FTC fines Infomercial kingpin Kevin Trudeau $37.6 million for all of his get-rich-quick schemes, he claims he's flat broke; Remington Financial Group's "advance fee" scam has cost small business owners their dreams and millions of dollars.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A promoter steals musical artists' money and dreams; an ex-IRS agent is caught in a $13 million accounting fraud and uses taxpayer money plotting to murder those who know too much.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A counterfeit wine dealer dominates the fine wine scene, making millions selling his cheap basement blends through elite auction houses.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A US Military contractor loots his company of $190 million and goes on a wild spending spree, including a reported $10 million party for his teenage daughter and a $100,000 diamond-encrusted belt buckle.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When a sexy Florida former escort plots to take her husband's money and his life, her lover tips off the police and her deadly plan is all caught on tape.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Daylon Pierce is a consummate ladies' man who claims to be a licensed stockbroker, wooing unsuspecting women through internet dating sites; after the women hand over millions of dollars, Pierce robs them blind and breaks their hearts.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: The former New Orleans Mayor exploits the tragedy of Hurricane Katrina by accepting bribes and corrupting the rebuilding process.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Detroit Mayor Kwame Kilpatrick and his associates extort city contractors, abuse public funds, and turn the mayor's office into their own cash machine, costing the city millions.
